user.title: Northumberland Bin Collection
user.description: Enter your postcode to find the bin collection schedule for your address.

address.title: Select Your Address
address.description: Choose your property from the list below.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Northumberland bin collection service. Please check your network and try again.
error.invalid_postcode: No addresses were found for this postcode. Please check it and try again.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

update_failed.title: Bin collection data could not be updated
update_failed.description:
The Northumberland bin collection website could not be reached or its content could not be parsed. The calendar will continue to show previously fetched data until the next successful update.

Error: {error}
